decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 8/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 70/3226 lines reworked (2.2%, 26/50). 0/33 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 3.9% (6/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 66. Session 11: 53 (process:40 efficiency:8 ttfw:5). Session 12: 54 (process:40 efficiency:10 ttfw:4).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 260/260 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters share interface: NotificationAdapter. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
